---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new platform, tool, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is it for?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Include API examples or usage scenarios if possible.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them.

## Additional context

Links to platform APIs, related issues, or anything else useful.
